subject: Your AI roundup is here, Денис
body:
The AI cost paradox no one warned you about

Your AI roundup is here

*Note: You are receiving this platform-related update because you have an active Educative account. If you wish to unsubscribe from product or other updates related to your account, you can do so anytime.

Денис, we made some major updates to one of our most popular courses.

FEATURED COURSE

Grokking the AWS Certified Machine Learning Engineer - Associate

Start Learning → (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VVZ6Mh5lYc60W3bPZB02X8ktdW2C4PM95N-4W3MwF3Sn5m_5PW5BWr2F6lZ3nLW81fP2v3t8PG9W44ZKW64gH7l8W35K5b25YRlk-W3MNhLT7FQfvtV4zF9C7wPQvlVmfLbQ6ySv__W6fpNCh7f1K9sW73BmFK1C9R65W1tThxc2B80nDN716zbX_GrmcW9bm3m_8VK4t_W5GhqFN4Hrth4W30RPzC4rNXLbW4vLKvD3lTz1SW1V8ZPL2qy9JhW7ljkfR1kfw91VCZ23l3MDwfLW3XwS5261yDGwV5npRd8V_VvsW8q5j9V3X4t3DW2h1Hgt28-wrbW4_x_cT2TTr5xW6wWHQr3Jxz8HW4DK99k5McP2pW7pFy4q5MPH5TW3-8j6x2jlzDtW7qvZ864MPj3xVwpQ5g5vsLc9W9c4KmS276dfmW35Br-b6j-L9ZW7jzQpL756H1DW1MnmYk4rM7WKW4Y9NFW88ZKcfW4HX5dw1DqnS2f2MpycF04 )

Operationalize the ML lifecycle and advance your engineering career by becoming an AWS Certified Machine Learning Engineer. Learn automated deployment pipelines and scalable ML infrastructure.

Also included in your Educative membership is access to The Educative Newsletter. Here's this week's topic:

THIS WEEK'S NEWSLETTER

The hidden economics of AI inference at production scale

Read Newsletter → (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VVZ6Mh5lYc60W3bPZB02X8ktdW2C4PM95N-4W3MwF3Sn7lxC-W5BWSxg6lZ3mtW9g7dtt8qQdflW5Zh7Yx8z9M-dW8ZzxQ05k-bmvW665rgY6WNHFyW6K5YXc90DJtsW24YJtf2tl9X3VpyCsv8VKMlTW8Nvqsj5qHTQ5W6q6x4417gbJ3N14Y-L17ryg-W7F540j6pQdR-W7qLPSl6DhxnXW5zdlwK1XyWS5W7VCpbM24L-vGW3MW8Mt2NFT6GW6j36T46vtPLCW69dglY28kq6NW7spT8z52ft1kW1NmqhW2w0KT5W3WC6gS7RTggxW66g1DT1kw8FNW7zVTX252jmMcW1nMw4h6YwKFKN8Vf81q8bDF0W10tYks18Vn8hW8hbL5151ctw6W3H_-Hd2k-kS1W53RdRj4z6x_6W86SrG_4KGFCMW6v9YLG2JvpskW3BTRSw4mPClwW758Jkb8xr308W3xv8Q44wJcZWW8H_WSb43HyY4W7QbN065XrvTqW6cCR5L3KnzDQW8M_8PT3q9g--W3P9pFs33KQYtM73B-FPC9rPW70QnVK6mj-VmW17smkp4VFy6cW2BBCSb7PYz-cW2LDlhT8vRrK9W3bHXJW2tHbw1W6R3KPs6fRDcDV4WsG03klv_FW2rsPs_45drtLTSZsf51TX6gVXzGqx4-H9NlW6cPdVq3dJCxKdqFygM04 )

Inference costs have dropped 280x in two years, but enterprise AI bills are growing faster than ever. Why? Agentic workflows burn 5–30x more tokens than basic prompts, GPUs sit idle 80% of the time, and hidden costs (data egress, networking, engineering overhead) compound at production scale.

Learn on the Go

App Store (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VVZ6Mh5lYc60W3bPZB02X8ktdW2C4PM95N-4W3MwF3V83prCCW95jsWP6lZ3krW8Y88NN7pZR9hW2rdfxQ5M0fCmW2B8SP87GzcfjW6hTzg98590S3W4Rwqmt3S6ZxSW1l_qMC6P4FSgW83-hN34bbsqSW6J9fJY7RLWyrW7RmM5s8BLFB6W2d1Snk6PtblfVHVln32z54jjW8w6CZj4Z9yc5W7X-H3r5hbtsmW6Yt8n23fSg51N8JyFdHYhZ_CW4hLPNp56WBcKW4bBs8T4fzKhzN7KNfM4Tq2SsN29gCNB2yMTNW94GsY01mhXWJW33VQBh4mlKNzW4gvrLw2VDCB7W1hms0g2QHvz-N7cdtC8LXCKGVGTN-q1KNXHPW7nX20Y1B2V4DW229R203Qcfr7N63VYr93Pw81W2L32qJ8x7nbDN6TRDCNt12Wrf7v5HFd04 ) Google Play (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VVZ6Mh5lYc60W3bPZB02X8ktdW2C4PM95N-4W3MwF3S45m_5PW50kH_H6lZ3pcW30BQd76pjb_0W4yTZhv1_4-2XW5vL0-05KtyvJN8th7NyYpDMfW8JHk0k5wZHVMW8zNdpY70CXQmW2c4Gl81ynfGWW97bYCt277rQlN31G22G2tDsBW7GvhSv2rjsN2W1Fcch54MFwH1W2LhGDJ1nlWqnW2hd0YX6nvMZ5W71CRw734_Xd3W128wjF4JD82vW2385c68DtnM4W4yv72g8qhJj5W465Lc14RdWyXW3JTPVb39t9wxW7-yPfl1QBTzmW3Dypgc5w-5TMW6qFG2L6fh-WjW80XXyw89xkWfN8xlcmV2Vx7dVNfYgK7QK7dcW6C_Nfr6DZx9mVvsCyZ3kw2JmW3hfPWd20y6HWW2JF4TX42SQP0W7xm1hh3xNtG3W9cTm3j3rFLtSW1wHJM95GFCHzf76vjWW04 )
